Reviews Contact

Client Reviews

4.7/5 average rating from 6+ happy clients

What Our Clients Say

Real feedback from homeowners and businesses who trust Pearson and Sons Flooring Specialist to get the job done right.

“Pearson and Sons did an amazing job installing new hardwood floors in our Brookside home. The team was professional, efficient, and the floors look absolutely beautiful. They even helped us choose the perfect stain to match our existing furniture. Highly recommend!”

Sarah G. Hardwood Flooring
Jul 15, 2024

“We hired Pearson and Sons to install tile in our kitchen and bathrooms. The quality of the work was excellent, and the price was fair. There was a slight delay due to weather, but they communicated proactively and kept us informed throughout the process.”

Michael B. Tile Flooring
Aug 2, 2024

“Pearson and Sons installed laminate flooring in our basement. The team was professional, efficient, and the floors look great. They even cleaned up after themselves, which was a huge plus. Great value for the price!”

Jessica K. Laminate Flooring
Sep 10, 2024

“We had Pearson and Sons install vinyl flooring in our laundry room. The quality of the work was excellent, and the price was very reasonable. The team was friendly and professional, and we would definitely use them again.”

David L. Vinyl Flooring
Oct 5, 2024

“Pearson and Sons repaired some water damage to our hardwood floors. They were able to match the existing stain perfectly, and the repairs are seamless. Excellent service!”

Amy S. Floor Repair
Nov 20, 2024

“The team at Pearson and Sons did a great job installing new carpet in our living room. They were punctual, professional, and the installation was flawless. We are very happy with the results.”

Robert P. Carpet Installation
Jan 12, 2025
Pearson And Sons Flooring Specialist

Trusted flooring contractor professionals serving Tulsa, OK and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
